title: fix: ignore Polar for launch top-up quests
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes Polar checkout credits from the launch-era top-up quest evaluator.
- Keeps top_up_since_launch and top_up_100_since_launch based on Stripe checkout credits from 21/06/26 onward.
- Updates quest tests to assert Polar rows do not create launch top-up rewards and Stripe rows still do.

gist.headline: Quest Log Cleanup
gist.blurb: We've tightened up the launch-era top-up quests to ensure they only trigger for original Stripe checkouts, keeping the history books accurate.
gist.summary: Updated the account setup quest evaluator to exclude Polar checkouts from triggering the launch-era top-up rewards, restricting them strictly to Stripe checkouts from June 2021 onward.
gist.impact: Users will no longer incorrectly receive launch-era top-up quest rewards for recent Polar transactions.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an accountant or archivist, carefully reviewing a quest log or ledger book to sort out different types of transactions.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, carefully inspecting a glowing digital ledger book with a magnifying glass. A chunky retro monitor in the background displays a quest log. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
